name: Del Staigers
abstract: Charles Delaware Staigers was an American cornetist. He was born on August 20, 1899, in Muncie, Indiana.

concerts.label: Captain Eugene LaBarre and His World's Fair Band

works.t: Fantasia on The Carnival of Venice

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I never met Del Staigers... I was really impressed with that. I just didn't know what jazz was, basically, and I didn't know classical either, but I knew that I happened to like Del Staigers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: Anyway, we had Del Staigers, Charlie Margolis was playing second trumpet.

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder Part 2
about_quotes.evidence: I heard Del Staigers... I always wanted to play like Del Staigers
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder Part 2 interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 12, 1998
